Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class OmniIntegrationProcedure

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.OmniIntegrationProcedure
public class OmniIntegrationProcedure extends Metadata

Java class for OmniIntegrationProcedure complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="OmniIntegrationProcedure">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="customHtmlTemplates" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customJavaScript" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="designerCustomizationType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="elementTypeComponentMapping" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isActive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isIntegrationProcedure" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isMetadataCacheDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isOmniScriptEmbeddable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isTestProcedure" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isWebCompEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="language" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="lastPreviewPage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="nameSpace" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="omniProcessElements" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}OmniProcessElement" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="omniProcessKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="omniProcessType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}OmniProcessType"/>
         <element name="overrideKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="propertySetConfig" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="requiredPermission" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="responseCacheType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="subType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="uniqueName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="versionNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double"/>
         <element name="webComponentKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getOmniProcessElements

      public List<OmniProcessElement> getOmniProcessElements()
      Gets the value of the omniProcessElements property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the omniProcessElements property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getOmniProcessElements().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list OmniProcessElement

      Returns:
      The value of the omniProcessElements property.
